challenge.title: Korak 5
challenge.description: Inside the LinkedList class, add an __init__ method that sets self.length to 0. Ovo inicijalizuje brojač za praćenje koliko čvorova (elemenata) je trenutno u listi.

challengeFiles.name: main

tests.text: You should set self.length to 0 inside the __init__ method of the LinkedList class.
